title: Building Foundation Differential Settlement Logger with Angular Distortion Alert
description: Monitors settlement at three adjacent column footings using Bowden-cable resistive gauges, computes pairwise angular distortions, compares to Skempton & MacDonald thresholds, transmits daily summaries via LoRa to a building manager's receiver, and triggers an on-site alarm when θ exceeds 1/500 — focused on foundation geotechnics rather than superstructure dynamics.
objective: Detect differential settlement events breaching θ=1/500 threshold; daily LoRa telemetry of settlement trends; alarm escalation at θ=1/300; seasonal thermal heave correction.
constraints: Arduino Mega, three 100 mm potentiometer gauges, DS18B20 ground temperature, LoRa SX1276, SD card, buzzer; column spacing 4.5 m; 2-storey RC frame; 5 V USB or solar 12 V.
supporting_fact_titles: Allowable Angular Distortion and Differential Settlement Limits
design_element_titles: Resistive Settlement Gauge — Bowden Cable Potentiometer

element_usage_notes.Resistive Settlement Gauge — Bowden Cabl: Three gauges at footings A, B, C; differential settlement pairs AB and BC computed every 30 min.
element_usage_notes.LoRa SX1276 Remote Telemetry Node: Daily LoRa packet contains settlement array, angular distortions, and soil temperature.
element_usage_notes.Buzzer and LED Fault Annunciator: Warning tone at θ>1/500; fast alarm at θ>1/300; LED brightness scales with worst-case distortion.
element_usage_notes.DS18B20 1-Wire Temperature Probe Array: Ground temperature correction applied to remove seasonal heave artefact (~0.01 mm/°C/m).

element_interactions.from: Resistive Settlement Gauge — Bowden Cable Potentiometer
element_interactions.description: Worst-case pairwise angular distortion triggers alarm when threshold exceeded.

element_interactions.to: Resistive Settlement Gauge — Bowden Cable Potentiometer
element_interactions.description: Temperature correction applied to raw settlement readings to remove seasonal heave component.

element_interactions.from: Resistive Settlement Gauge — Bowden Cable Potentiometer
element_interactions.description: Settlement array and angular distortion values included in daily LoRa telemetry packet.
